steps.title: Identify the paired objects
steps.content: The team determined two parallel things: how mixing varies across regions and what impact it has on heat and nutrients. These two coordinate noun clauses are joined by "and."

steps.title: Reject added punctuation
steps.content: A adds an unnecessary comma between the two coordinate clauses. B uses a colon, which would introduce an explanation or list. C uses a semicolon, which is for separating independent clauses. No punctuation is needed before "and." The answer is D.
